summary: Tested email/password authentication system including: login, admin create-user, forgot-password, reset-password flows. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend dual auth (Google + Email) UI verified.
features_tested: POST /api/auth/login - email/password login: ✅ PASS (returns user without password_hash)
POST /api/auth/login - wrong credentials: ✅ PASS (returns 401)
POST /api/auth/login - missing fields: ✅ PASS (returns 400)
POST /api/auth/create-user - admin creates user: ✅ PASS
POST /api/auth/create-user - invalid email validation: ✅ PASS (returns 400)
POST /api/auth/create-user - password min 6 chars validation: ✅ PASS (returns 400)
POST /api/auth/create-user - duplicate email prevention: ✅ PASS (returns 400)
POST /api/auth/create-user - unauthorized access: ✅ PASS (returns 401)
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - existing user: ✅ PASS (returns reset_link when RESEND_API_KEY not configured)
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - non-existent email: ✅ PASS (same response for security)
POST /api/auth/reset-password - valid token: ✅ PASS
POST /api/auth/reset-password - invalid/expired/used token: ✅ PASS (returns 400)
POST /api/auth/reset-password - short password: ✅ PASS (returns 400)
GET /api/auth/me - returns user without password_hash: ✅ PASS
GET /api/users - excludes password_hash field: ✅ PASS
auth_type field - email users have auth_type='email': ✅ PASS
Frontend landing page - dual auth options: ✅ PASS (Google + Email buttons)
Frontend email login form - all elements present: ✅ PASS (email, password, show/hide toggle, forgot link)
Frontend forgot password flow: ✅ PASS
Frontend /reset-password page: ✅ PASS (renders correctly with token)
Frontend InviteUsersModal - dual tabs: ✅ PASS (Google invite + Email create tabs)
Frontend email create form in admin modal: ✅ PASS (name, email, password, role select)
critical_code_review_comments: - POST /api/auth/login: Validates credentials, creates session, returns user without password_hash
- POST /api/auth/create-user: Admin-only, validates email format, password min 6 chars, duplicate prevention
- POST /api/auth/forgot-password: Creates reset token, returns link when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
- POST /api/auth/reset-password: Validates token (not expired/used), updates password
- GET /api/auth/me and GET /api/users: Both exclude password_hash from response
- auth_type field: Correctly set to 'email' for email users, 'google' for OAuth users
- password_hash properly excluded from all API responses
- Forgot password doesn't reveal if email exists (security)
- Reset tokens are marked as used after successful reset
- Session cookies are httpOnly, secure, samesite=none
- Landing page shows both Google and Email login options
- Email login form has proper UX (show/hide password toggle, forgot password link)
- Admin modal has tabs for Google invite vs Email create

test_credentials.note: Test users created and cleaned up during testing

seed_data_creation: Test email users created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email/password authentication is fully implemented and tested. Key flows: 1) Admin creates email user via POST /api/auth/create-user. 2) User logs in via POST /api/auth/login. 3) Forgot password via POST /api/auth/forgot-password (returns reset_link in response when RESEND_API_KEY not configured). 4) Reset via POST /api/auth/reset-password with token. The Google OAuth flow (POST /api/auth/session) remains unchanged and functional. All endpoints properly exclude password_hash from responses. Legacy Google OAuth users don't have auth_type field set (null), but new OAuth logins will set auth_type='google'.
